allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{r[\\"source\\"]}: {r[\\"slug\\"]} - {r[\\"name\\"]}'\) for r in d['results']]; print\(f'Sources: {d[\\"sources\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'count': len\(d.get\('chats',[]\)\), 'sample': d.get\('chats',[]\)[0] if d.get\('chats'\) else None}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); repos=data.get\('repos',[]\); print\(f'Found {len\(repos\)} repos'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"name\\"]}: {r[\\"path\\"]}'\) for r in repos[:20]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); repos=data.get\('repos',[]\); print\(f'Found {len\(repos\)} repos'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"name\\"]}: {r[\\"path\\"]}'\) for r in repos[:25]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{p[\\"id\\"]}: {p[\\"name\\"]}'\) for p in data.get\('projects',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cmds=data.get\('commands',[]\); print\(f'Found {len\(cmds\)} commands'\); [print\(f'  /{c[\\"name\\"]}: {c.get\(\\"description\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for c in cmds[:20]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cmds=data.get\('commands',[]\); print\(f'Found {len\(cmds\)} commands'\); [print\(f'  /{c[\\"name\\"]}: {c.get\(\\"description\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for c in cmds]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cmds=data.get\('commands',[]\); print\(f'Found {len\(cmds\)} commands'\); [print\(f'  /{c[\\"name\\"]}: {c.get\(\\"description\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for c in cmds[:10]]")

PowerShell($body = '{"input":{"sessionKey":"sess_690048481a694c2b9407bd6f515e73ec"}}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/ipc/middleware_chat_history" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; $json = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $m = $json.messages[1]; Write-Output "id: $\($m.id\)"; Write-Output "createdAt: $\($m.createdAt\)")

PowerShell(try { $body = '{"input":{"includeLocal":true,"includeClawHub":true,"limit":50,"sort":"downloads"}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/ipc/middleware_skills_discover" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $installed = @\($json.results | Where-Object { $_.installed -eq $true }\); "Total: $\($json.results.Count\), Installed: $\($installed.Count\)"; foreach \($s in $installed\) { "  $\($s.slug\) | source=$\($s.source\) | installed=$\($s.installed\)" } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $body = '{"input":{"includeLocal":true,"includeClawHub":true,"limit":50,"sort":"downloads"}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/ipc/middleware_skills_discover" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total results: $\($json.results.Count\)"; $local = @\($json.results | Where-Object { $_.source -eq 'local' }\); "Local in results: $\($local.Count\)"; "Sources: $\($json.sources -join ', '\)"; "Warnings: $\($json.warnings -join ', '\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $body = '{"input":{"includeLocal":true,"includeClawHub":true,"limit":50,"sort":"downloads"}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/ipc/middleware_skills_discover" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $local = @\($json.results | Where-Object { $_.source -eq 'local' }\); foreach \($s in $local\) { "  $\($s.slug\) | installed=$\($s.installed\) | enabled=$\($s.enabled\)" } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $body = '{"input":{"includeLocal":true,"includeClawHub":true,"limit":50,"sort":"downloads"}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/ipc/middleware_skills_discover" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $installed = @\($json.results | Where-Object { $_.installed -eq $true }\); $local = @\($json.results | Where-Object { $_.source -eq 'local' }\); "Total: $\($json.results.Count\), Installed: $\($installed.Count\), Local: $\($local.Count\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/ipc/middleware_usage" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"input":{"days":7}}' -UseBasicParsing; $json = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $json._debug_cost | Select-Object -Property updatedAt,days,totals | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 4; $r7 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/ipc/middleware_usage_daily" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"input":{"days":7}}' -UseBasicParsing; $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/ipc/middleware_usage_daily" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"input":{"days":1}}' -UseBasicParsing; "7d count: $\(\($r7.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).daily.Count\)  1d count: $\(\($r1.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).daily.Count\)")
